{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Kalter
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Kalter]] is the name shared by [[Sola]]'s family.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
